items.title: New Music Releases and Upcoming Albums in 2026
items.summary: A regularly updated guide to the new albums, EPs, mixtapes, and projects getting released in the coming weeks and months

items.title: Cocanha Celebrate Occitan Culture with Collaboration and Community
items.summary: The duo's music illuminates and reclaims the rich history of the Occitan language and culture of Southern France. Read full story on the Bandcamp Daily.

items.title: Camilla Pisani, “Konstellationen”
items.summary: Inspired by the night sky, the Italian electronic artist builds an acerbic, yet immaculate, sound world. Read full story on the Bandcamp Daily.

items.title: The Best Field Recordings on Bandcamp, June 2026
items.summary: This month, sounds from Midwestern casinos, a European tour, and a Peruvian ayahuasca ceremony. Read full story on the Bandcamp Daily.
